full_text:
Zhuge Chuo 諸葛綽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Chuo (諸葛綽)was born in Yangdu county, Langya commandery. Due to his association with Sun Ba, Sun Quan wanted him to be punished. Zhuge Ke poisoned Zhuge Chuo. Zhuge Chuo was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhuge Chuo lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
